final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: needs a technical documentation / step-by-step tutorial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a clear 4-step vertical or horizontal flow, numbered 1-2-3-4 prominently
Subject: must include Docker container visualization, Hermes deployment process, GLMCodingPlan integration
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean technical/workspace environment — exact setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a clear, instructional atmosphere — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: needs a professional tech documentation direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "1", "2", "3", "4" as step numbers, "Docker", "Hermes", "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: must show 4 distinct sequential steps, must illustrate Docker container context, must show the integration flow
Avoid: must avoid cluttered layouts that obscure the step sequence
